---
description: "Use when editing Week 1 architecture, scene flow, placeholder UI, or preload conventions in waiting-game. Captures preferred documentation sync updates for README and checklist."
applyTo: "README.md, WEEK1_CHECKLIST.md, src/**/*.js, tests/**/*.js"
---

# Week 1 Docs Sync Preferences

- Apply these preferences during Week 1 scaffolding only.
- When scene flow or architecture changes, prefer updating `README.md` in the same change.
- When Week 1 scope or task status changes, prefer updating `WEEK1_CHECKLIST.md` in the same change.
- Prefer documenting only scaffold and placeholder behavior; defer gameplay mechanics details to Week 2 planning notes.
- Prefer concise milestone language tied to validation commands: `npm run dev`, `npm run lint`, `npm run test`, `npm run build`.
